Global Variable# kIMKCommandMenuItemName

macOS 10.5+

```
let kIMKCommandMenuItemName: String
```

## [Discussion](/documentation/inputmethodkit/kimkcommandmenuitemname#Discussion)

Used to look up the `NSMenuItem` object that is passed to menu item actions.
